title: PROVIDENCE PLACE - 211info
text: PROVIDENCE PLACE PROVIDENCE PLACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides subsidized housing with 66 units. Five of the units are accessible for people with mobility, hearing, or vision impairments. 3524 Fisher Road Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: Low-income adults ages 62 and older and adults with disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 363-9640 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 363-9640 Main phone Main phone (503) 363-9640 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to check status of the waitlist FEES: Rent based on 30% of income DOCUMENTS: Proof of income AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties Services: Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Older Adults If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
